message:
Remove unused imports, add reduced-motion + intersection gating

components/client-shell.tsx:
- Removed unused useState import from React (only useEffect is
  used in this component)

components/glow-orbits.tsx:
- Removed unused useState and useScroll imports
- Added useReducedMotion from framer-motion; when enabled:
  - Mouse tracking event listener is not attached
  - CSS ring animations are not started
  - Parallax transform style is set to undefined instead of
    the springed mouse position, preventing layout shift
- Both the mouse-move effect and the ring animation effect now
  gate on isIntersecting from the IntersectionObserver, so the
  event listener and Web Animations API calls only run when the
  orbits container is in the viewport. Previously, mouse-move
  was always active and ring animations started on mount
  regardless of visibility
- Replaced window.matchMedia("prefers-reduced-motion") manual
  check with the framer-motion useReducedMotion hook for
  consistency with the rest of the codebase

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
